title: EARLY CHILDHOOD HUB OF LANE COUNTY - 211info
text: UNITED WAY OF LANE COUNTY EARLY CHILDHOOD HUB OF LANE COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parenting resources and classes, a calendar of community and family events, and a variety of topical and age-based articles on parenting, and more. 3171 Gateway Loop Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies depending on classes or events Email (541) 741-6000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 741-6000 Reception Main phone (541) 741-6000 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Varies by service; most are free or low-cost DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Services: Children's Play Groups Community Calendars * Parenting Issues Parent/Child Activity Groups Parenting Materials Parenting Skills Classes Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - GRANT FUNDING VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - COMMUNITY VOLUNTEER SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
